svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="D--vc_weojhp6Yh9GZVi" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-159" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0089bf;" value="Diffie-Hellman 金鑰交換" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hAlice" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#00aeff;" value="Alice" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="180" x="60" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hEve" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#d32f2f;" value="Eve（網路上看到）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="280" x="310" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hBob" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#00aeff;" value="Bob" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="180" x="660" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laneA" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f4ff;strokeColor=#80d1ff;strokeWidth=1;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="180" x="60" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laneE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff5f5;strokeColor=#f5b0b0;strokeWidth=1;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="280" x="310" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laneB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f4ff;strokeColor=#80d1ff;strokeWidth=1;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="180" x="660" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="挑秘密 a" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="80" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1d" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="挑秘密 b" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="680" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ga" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=12;" value="送出 G^a" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff5f5;strokeColor=#d32f2f;fontColor=#d32f2f;fontSize=12;" value="看到 G, G^a" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="160" x="370" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="220" y="197" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="370" y="197" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr1b" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="530" y="197" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="680" y="197" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#80d1ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#003e57;fontSize=12;" value="送出 G^b" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="140" x="680" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff5f5;strokeColor=#d32f2f;fontColor=#d32f2f;fontSize=12;" value="再看到 G^b
（手上有 G、G^a、G^b）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="370" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="680" y="262" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="530" y="262" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr2b" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="370" y="262" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="220" y="262" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ac" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#003e57;strokeColor=#003e57;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="算 (G^b)^a = G^ab" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="80" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#003e57;strokeColor=#003e57;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="算 (G^a)^b = G^ab" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="680" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d32f2f;strokeColor=#a82424;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="算不出 G^ab
（離散對數困難性）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="370" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="共同金鑰 G^ab" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="80" y="455" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="共同金鑰 G^ab" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="680" y="455" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
